segments.text: It is very, very fortunate and auspicious
that we are celebrating the Diwali in Greece
especially in Delphi.
This has a really ancient history
And as you know Athena resided here
She was the Primordial Mother
Atho means Primodal
So place have been described
has been described, even the Puranas as Manipur Vibhya.
Manipur is the Nabhi Chakra and also in Sanskrit Manipura means the Nabhi Chakra
so it's described as the Manipuri Vibhya
It was written Mani-Pu-Rehe-Dri-Veh
Just imagine these Puranas, these ancient time books
God knows how old they are
must be at least eight thousand or maybe more

the Alisha tree that's the Athena.
So I mean how it was known to them maybe through torsion area you can say but its

we can say whole universe all creations She created.
Then She came down
Came Down

but coming down She created Maha Lakshmi principle
which is for our ascending
This was Her movement

Is In The Navi.
She incarnates IN THE NAVI they say
Because

Shipping is there one of the most important business and I came with my husband here because

And we were surprised that at airport,we had the minister's wife another minister

They said you see what happened?
that our husbands told us, if you really want to see a lady who is absolutely immaculately

Imagine the idea of serenity doesn't exist now in women world but these ladies

And then afterwards there was an election coming also but I don't forget the way
